title: Stainach
summary: Stainach (German: [ˈʃtaɪnax]) is a former municipality in the district of Liezen in the Austrian state of Styria. Since the 2015 Styria municipal structural reform, it is part of the municipality Stainach-Pürgg.
text:
Stainach (German: [ˈʃtaɪnax]) is a former municipality in the district of Liezen in the Austrian state of Styria. Since the 2015 Styria municipal structural reform, it is part of the municipality Stainach-Pürgg.

Geography
Stainach lies in the Enns valley.
